description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a glossy black finish, featuring a chaise lounge on the left side and a three-seat main section. The sofa has a sleek, contemporary appearance with smooth, slightly rounded armrests on both ends and a continuous, segmented backrest. The seat and back cushions are visibly attached and uniformly sized, with subtle button tufting adding a touch of detail to the otherwise minimalist design. The legs are short, slender, and slightly tapered, positioned at the corners and finished in a dark tone that complements the upholstery. The surface appears highly reflective, suggesting a leather or faux leather material, and the overall build is robust yet inviting. This piece would be suitable for upscale urban environments such as modern apartments, lobbies, or stylish waiting areas.
description: A glossy black L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, smooth armrests, and button-tufted, attached cushions. The design is modern and sleek, with short, tapered legs and a highly reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, chaise lounge on the left, three-seat section, and both armrests with button-tufted cushions.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the profile of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length, with the chaise lounge extending outward.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, focusing on the main seating section, right armrest, and the sofa's sleek profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniformly sized back cushions with subtle button tufting and a single, continuous seat cushion for the main section and chaise lounge.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, medium height, smoothly rounded with a slight outward curve, fully padded and integrated into the sofa's frame.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, slender, slightly tapered legs positioned at the corners and under the chaise, likely made of metal or dark-finished wood, exposed and minimalistic.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest segmented into three attached cushions with subtle tufting, providing uniform support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black, smooth, glossy leather or faux leather finish with subtle button tufting on the back cushions and no visible decorative stitching.
